expectations.text: Creates a prefillTransformer for the burials-ez form
expectations.evidence: Creates transformer mapping to both root-level fields and custom claimant field names
Adds profilePersonalInfoPage with dataAdapter for custom SSN path

expectations.text: Adds profileContactInfoPages to formConfig OR explains why it should not be added
expectations.evidence: Presents compatibility warning: claimantEmail, claimantPhone, claimantAddress are custom names. Warns user but offers to proceed. Recommends Personal Information only.

expectations.text: Adds route protection in the form's container/App component
expectations.evidence: Enhances BurialsApp.jsx route protection with prefill data check

expectations.text: Describes vets-api backend steps including form_profile.rb changes
Describes creating a FormProfile class for the form
Describes the form profile mapping YAML
Describes adding prefill settings to settings.yml, development.yml, and test.yml
Does not attempt to create or modify files outside the vets-website workspace
expectations.evidence: Backend changes described only, not executed

quality_bonuses.text: Correctly identifies when profileContactInfoPages is incompatible
quality_bonuses.evidence: Identifies claimantEmail, claimantPhone, claimantIntPhone, claimantAddress as custom names. Presents the skill's compatibility warning.

quality_bonuses.text: Preserves existing form field names and data model
quality_bonuses.evidence: Maps transformer to custom claimant field names rather than replacing data model

quality_bonuses.text: Asks the user which prefill pages they want before implementing
quality_bonuses.evidence: Presents structured question: 'Choose Prefill Pages' with Personal Information only, Contact Information only, or Both options
